summary: Scoped the US-844 settlement-panel fix to the deal score-change presentation. The settlement result table now exposes semantic cell labels in markup and switches to a stacked row-card layout at narrower desktop/laptop widths so the before/delta/after values remain visible inside the central panel instead of clipping the right side. Domain scoring and result semantics were not changed. Requested automated tests and npm run verify passed. A fresh Playwright screenshot rerun could not be completed in this session because starting the local Vite server on 127.0.0.1:5331 was blocked by the sandbox and the escalation retry was rejected by the environment usage gate.

tests_run.evidence: 18/18 tests passed, including the new settlement score-change cell-label regression test.

tests_run.command: npm run test -- src/ui/render.test.ts src/ui/controller.test.ts src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts

tests_run.evidence: Vitest: 13 files and 126 tests passed. Build: tsc and vite build completed successfully.
